{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323193025B0C7729FBBDA4957EFC6"}"},"total":288},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7521720039893025560","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看啊，颜文字也很有趣"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1751287130,"group_id":"7395896015569554494","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"还是学生更新较慢 新人写手","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2j77PBOc/THtJ2jFT2kpLkpIb2fgUezXkBBI0wFhboL","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a49df754c6b942d7bb0c7be43f72ae5e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788921&x-signature=OX5n24p3zlP6qwbVDOGzD5GcJe8%3D","user_id":"1231889999605549","user_name":"快乐的无忧"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1231889999605549","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7395896015569554494","book_info":{"abstract":"（分低是因为刚开始写，后面会涨哒꒰ *•ɷ•* ꒱）
季言空降新出男团Ting，却因为抢了C位被骂上了热搜，只能打游戏放松的季言，却意外被NCR打野看中，并通过直播迅速爆火，可季言却被潜规则了，洛时续将人救了回去，季言也通过这件事成功退出了娱乐圈，然后被洛时续挖去了HTD。于是便有了：
“队长，你的新代言的赠品呢”小白问。
“送人了”。
与此同时季言坐着新的电竞椅打了个喷嚏。
后来眼尖的网友很快发现，洛神对这位新射手过分宠溺了，过生日，送礼物，监督饮食，于是便有了“续言”CP，正主时不时发糖，太甜了吧。
可是很快洛时续便发现，他家小射手似乎没有表面看起来那么简单。
（白切黑狐系美人受VS双如标粘人大狗攻）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/1397599b97edbc9cb96c6c2798f02320","author":"清夜回响","author_id":"","book_id":"7395896015569554494","book_name":"男团被骂，来打电竞当团宠","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383848","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3795人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":94,"name":"团宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=94&name=团宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":508,"name":"电竞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=508&name=电竞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7395901814115140158","read_count":"3795","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"288621"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"174","tags":"双男主,纯爱,团宠,现代,电竞","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o6bb01514057b332cf1b7ffe11a5797fb~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779449425&x-signature=2lgypjJX4nh6vzPhtKaUHWx9lLo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"334730109911517","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"32"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323193025B0C7729FBBDA4957EFC6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4009,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1370},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7510890318563623705","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"可以の可以の真の超级好看啊啊啊强推强推刻画人物也很真实细腻!老师将永远追随!求更!虽然好多都在说前期言言の事为什么家里人没人帮什么の而且明知酒局有问题还是去了中招了。但们有没有想过这些只是铺垫?后期不是还是有人帮了言言吗都是一串连串の!为什么中招不中招可能言言…时半会还要呆在娱乐圈而不是来到电竞。不就是因为作者给言言刻画の就属于单纯受の而且主页说过受是“白切黑!”没人觉得很带感吗?!看后期发展。况且家里人老师也说过了。帮过撤一些热搜。而且言言他也不想让家里人知道所以没跟家里人说过言言就是一个很好の言言。补药在说我们言言蠢了，他没做错什么，老师怎么写就怎么看行吗，再说老师其实有好多都设置了点悬念。没有说具体。肯定到后期会有反转再详细说大家没必要拿着一处剧情来说，好看の文多了去了不想看就去看别的。而且没人感觉老师电竞写の剧情超级好哇啊啊啊啊就素希望老师在多写写受跟攻の甜甜日常想吃甜甜の饭!期待更新！","text_exts":[{"e":141,"s":138,"text":"娱乐圈","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A8%B1%E4%B9%90%E5%9C%88&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742654254957EFC6%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227510890318563623705%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227395896015569554494%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A8%B1%E4%B9%90%E5%9C%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1748769479,"group_id":"7395896015569554494","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"只是个破看小说的入","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N539bC80xdMCBBgtCYB+7vnkRKQ+r4Pw8J1nhY60MMjU","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/aeaf884884bf4c85a8aa9c0751bb5f04~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792345&x-signature=i%2BJiIPgtXPimbcuKcFYQhBL2b8g%3D","user_id":"2722859277623144","user_name":"线点点点"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2722859277623144","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,
